title: Drawing idea generators
gen8_desc: A highly popular system among artists and designers. A structured creative tool that helps generate balanced visual ideas by combining eight key elements into cohesive concepts for illustration and design.
gen10_desc: An expanded creative framework that builds richer and more detailed concepts by combining ten interconnected elements, ideal for advanced visual storytelling and world-building.
chaos_desc: A creative system used by illustrators and designers to break predictable thinking patterns and generate unexpected visual concepts. It combines structured randomness with surreal transformations, producing imaginative prompts that push ideas beyond logic, encouraging experimentation, abstraction, and bold visual storytelling.
act_desc: A story sketch generator designed to help build clear narrative structures. It organizes ideas into three stages - setup, complication, and resolution - making it easy to quickly outline compelling plots.
arch_desc: Inspired by tarot, each option acts as an archetype that shapes the core of an idea. These archetypes work as symbolic building blocks - each one carrying a distinct narrative tension, emotional tone, or conceptual direction.
tex_desc: A visual exploration tool for artists and designers focused on developing control, depth, and material realism through ink-based shading. It generates structured prompts for practicing a wide range of surface textures - from organic to synthetic - helping you build precision, contrast awareness, and expressive line work.
